name: Architects Design Pack
description: Bundles trade-off analysis skill and ADR generator prompt to give architects a complete decision-documentation toolkit. From comparing options to publishing a formal ADR.
author: ai-skills-maintainer

delivery_modes.instructions: Run trade-off analysis first to compare options, then feed the output into the ADR generator prompt.
The portal chains the two skills automatically: trade-off analysis → ADR generation as a single invocation.
Expose as an MCP tool callable from architecture review tooling.
Deploy as a Copilot Studio skill accessible from the architecture review Teams channel.
Deploy via internal API layer for air-gapped architecture reviews.

configuration.additional_notes: Slightly higher temperature than operational packs to allow richer prose in ADR sections.

changelog.notes: Initial package with trade-off analysis skill and ADR generator prompt.
